originalTitle: Ask HN: What was your "oh shit" moment with GenAI?
content: Most of us were amused when DALL-E and its peers went mainstream, and we were quick to point out the obvious flaws. Then ChatGPT hit the scene and again, many of us dismissed it as a parlor trick that would never amount to much. Using LLMs for coding initially was a only small step up from basic code completion, and a welcome farewell to Stack Overflow. I am curious: what was the specific moment that you went from those quaint, dismissive observations to a slightly panicked, "Uh Oh" realization of what these models can do?
chineseTitle: 问 HN：您对 GenAI 感到“糟糕”的时刻是什么？
chineseContent: 当 DALL-E 及其同行成为主流时，我们大多数人都感到好笑，并且我们很快指出了明显的缺陷。然后 ChatGPT 再次出现，我们中的许多人将其视为一个永远不会有多大作用的客厅把戏。最初使用 LLM 进行编码只是基本代码完成的一小步，也是对 Stack Overflow 的欢迎告别。我很好奇：您从那些古怪的、不屑一顾的观察到对这些模型可以做什么感到有点惊慌、“哦哦”的认识的具体时刻是什么？
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
